What We Do

End-to-End MBA Admission Support

From choosing the right program to receiving your offer letter — we guide you every step of the way.

🎯

Profile Evaluation & College Shortlisting

We analyse your academic background, work experience, and career goals to build a targeted list of colleges where you have the strongest chance of success.

📝

Application & Common Form Assistance

We help you complete a single Common Application Form (CAF) that applies to multiple top MBA/PGDM colleges — saving time and fees.

💬

Interview Coaching & Mock GDs

Structured telephonic and Skype interview preparation, WAT/GD simulations, and personalised feedback from seasoned mentors.

📊

Entrance Exam Guidance

Strategic advice on CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, NMAT, SNAP and state-level exams — including which exam best suits your profile.

💼

Online MBA for Working Professionals

Tailored guidance for graduates in the workforce who want a UGC-approved Online MBA to fast-track promotions and career growth.

🔖

Fee Waiver & Scholarship Assistance

We help eligible students apply for application fee waivers and merit-based scholarships at partner institutions.

Our Process

How It Works

A simple, structured journey from your first call to your admission letter.

1

Free Counselling

30-min session to discuss your profile and goals.

2

Profile Assessment

Map your academics to strongest target programs.

3

Fill the CAF

One Common Application Form for 100+ colleges.

4

Interview Prep

Mock interviews and GD coaching from home.

5

Admission & Joining

Compare offers and join your dream MBA.

For Working Professionals

Advance Your Career with an Online MBA

Already working? Hold a graduate degree but no Masters? A UGC-recognised Online MBA could unlock your next promotion — without quitting your job.

🏠

Study from anywhere

100% online, self-paced modules that fit around your work schedule.

🎓

UGC-recognised degrees

Only accredited programs from NAAC A/A+ rated universities.

📈

Career-linked specialisations

Finance, Marketing, HR, Operations, Analytics, Digital Business and more.

💰

Affordable fee structures

Significantly lower fees than full-time programs, with EMI options available.

Is Online MBA right for you?

If you have a graduate degree, are currently employed, and want a higher qualification without a career break — the answer is almost certainly yes.

You hold a graduate degree (any discipline)
You are currently employed or on a career break
You are looking for a promotion or salary hike
You have no prior MBA / PGDM / Masters degree
You want a 1-year or 2-year flexible option
Fill Application Form →

Entrance Exams

Exams We Counsel For

Not sure which exam to take? We help you choose the right test based on your profile and target colleges.

CAT

Common Admission Test — gateway to IIMs and 1200+ MBA colleges

XAT

Xavier Aptitude Test — for XLRI and 150+ top B-schools

CMAT

Common Management Admission Test — NTA-conducted, AICTE approved

MAT

Management Aptitude Test — accepted at 600+ MBA institutes

NMAT

NMIMS Management Aptitude Test — for NMIMS and partner schools

SNAP

Symbiosis National Aptitude Test — for all Symbiosis institutes

ATMA

AIMS Test for Management Admissions — flexible scheduling

State

OJEE, MAH-CET, KMAT, TANCET and other state-level exams

Our Edge

Why Students Choose Us

We don't just send applications — we build personalised strategies that consistently get results.

🎯

Personalised, not templated

Every student gets a unique shortlist and strategy built around their specific background, scores, and career goals.

📋

One form, multiple colleges

Our CAF covers 100+ colleges — fill it once and we handle the rest, saving you time and effort.

🏠

Interview prep from home

Skype and telephonic mock interviews so you're confident when the real call comes — no travel required.

💸

Zero or reduced application cost

Through our partner network, many students apply to top colleges with waived or reduced application fees.

🗺️

PAN India reach

We counsel students from Bhubaneswar to Bangalore, from tier-1 cities to tier-3 towns.

🔀

Both full-time & online pathways

Whether you're a fresh graduate or a working professional, we have a tailored admission pathway for you.

Student Stories

What Our Students Say

Over a thousand MBA aspirants have walked through our doors and into their dream colleges.

★★★★★

"I had a 65% in graduation and wasn't sure any good college would take me. The team shortlisted BIMTECH and Christ, helped me prep for GD/PI, and I got calls from both. Now I'm at BIMTECH — couldn't have done it without them."

RK
Ravi Kumar
PGDM, BIMTECH Greater Noida
★★★★★

"I was working in an IT firm for 4 years and kept delaying my MBA dream. One free call with their counsellor changed everything. They guided me to an Online MBA — perfect for my schedule and budget."

SP
Shreyasi Patnaik
Online MBA, Working Professional
★★★★★

"The mock interview sessions were incredibly realistic. I fumbled in my first mock but by session three I was crisp and confident. Cleared the final interview at IMI Bhubaneswar on my very first try."

AM
Aditya Mishra
MBA, IMI Bhubaneswar
